item.title: Web dashboard port 3737 hardcoded in 2 locations
item.intent: Dashboard default port has a single source of truth. No literal 3737 appears outside src/config/defaults.ts. Changing the default requires editing one line.
item.description: The dashboard default port 3737 is hardcoded in two locations: src/web/start.ts:10 (const DEFAULT_PORT = 3737) and src/cli/index.ts:3180 (string default "3737" in .option()). This is the same BUG-011 pattern as the Gateway port 18789. If the port is changed in start.ts, the CLI help text stays stale. Steps: (1) add DASHBOARD_DEFAULT_PORT = 3737 to src/config/defaults.ts; (2) import and use it in src/web/start.ts replacing DEFAULT_PORT; (3) import and use it in src/cli/index.ts replacing "3737" string; (4) run tests to confirm no regression. Scope: two files, ~4 lines changed.
